legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity/step bootstrap, flip animation runtime, navigation (bxslider), file pickers, math render, paste-formatting, a11y, cross-browser, annotations, Preview/Reader/Publish, or persistence flows.

mappings.reason: Launch Studio URL + listing page — environment bootstrap handled by cy.openAuthoringTool, not a component assertion
Create math activity (basic info) — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
Start authoring redirect — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
Add Generic Step — step-creation flow; Flashcard is a canvas content widget, not a Generic Step widget
Enter Step Title — step-wizard flow outside the Flashcard component
Cancel button in step creation — step-wizard flow
Change Step button — step-wizard flow
Enter Instructions for Students — page-level field, not the Flashcard component
Enter Instructions for Teachers — page-level field, not the Flashcard component

mappings.it: TC_10 — A new Flashcard is added and editable (default 3 cards) / TC_10b — "Add Card" appends a new card
TC_11 — Deleting a card removes it and remaining cards renumber

mappings.reason: Navigation between cards (left/right arrows) — bxslider runtime behaviour, not present in the static authoring DOM
Flip to reverse side — CSS flip animation runtime (.add-flip toggles option.isBackCardActive at runtime/Reader)

mappings.it: TC_14 — Text appears on both front and back of a card
TC_15 — Image media option + upload box are present in settings
mappings.note: control presence automated; actual file upload uses the OS file picker (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_16 — Video media option is present in settings
mappings.note: control presence automated; upload/URL + playback verified in Preview/Reader (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_17 — Audio media option is present in settings
mappings.note: QC mentions a math 'fx' editor, but the flashcard settings panel has NO math control — the Audio media option is asserted instead; math/LaTeX render is deferred

mappings.reason: Paste formatting from Word retained — clipboard/runtime sanitisation behaviour

mappings.it: TC_19 — Card Colour input accepts a colour value
mappings.note: input accepts value; live colour render verified in Preview (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_20 — "Show Header" and "Show Instruction" toggles reveal the fields
TC_21 — Outline / No Outline radios toggle the border style

mappings.reason: Save then Publish activity — Publish flow outside authoring DOM
Reader launch of published activity — Reader flow
Post-publish edit + republish reflected in Reader — Publish/Reader flow
Content update reflects in Reader after re-publish — Publish/Reader flow
Collapsing blank properties doesn't impact UI — settings-panel collapse visual/alignment check

mappings.it: TC_27 — Delete Card control is present and does not obstruct the card body
mappings.note: DOM presence/placement automated; hover-overlap is a visual check

mappings.reason: Edited content visible in Reader — Publish/Reader flow

mappings.it: TC_29 — Leaving a card blank keeps the editor stable (no crash)
mappings.note: empty card handled gracefully; 'validation blocks save' is a Save/Publish check (deferred)

mappings.reason: Unsupported file upload (.exe) blocked — OS file picker + server-side validation

mappings.it: TC_31 — Add Card is disabled at the source maximum (20 cards)
mappings.note: source caps cards at 20, so the QC '50+' case is asserted as the cap contract

mappings.it: TC_32 — Large text content does not break the card UI (no crash)
mappings.note: large image/large-media variant best seen in Preview (deferred)

mappings.reason: Keyboard accessibility (Tab/arrows) — a11y/focus-order assertion
Cross-browser compatibility (Chrome/Edge/Firefox) — multi-browser run matrix
Undo after deletion restores card — undo runtime behaviour (no Undo control in the static authoring DOM)
Overlapping annotations (highlight + outline) handled — annotation runtime
Annotations sync after editing text — annotation/Publish flow
Publish with blank cards succeeds — Publish flow
Reader: flip the card — Reader flow
Reader: play the audio — Reader playback
Reader: play the video — Reader playback
